name: hotwire-native-agent-kit
description: Audit, build, upgrade, push, sign, and debug Rails-powered Hotwire Native apps.

interface.longDescription: Audit Rails applications, implement Hotwire Native iOS and Android clients, validate navigation, Bridge Components, push, signing, and distribution, and diagnose version or lifecycle failures.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Rails app for Hotwire Native readiness.
Build the next verified iOS, Android, or push slice.
Diagnose this Hotwire Native bridge failure.
